## Teaching Goal

What concept should this triad teach?

## Main Repo Counterpart

Which area of `Scott.FunctionalProgrammingTriads` should this connect back to?

## Proposed Shape

- baseline form
- Haskell-style form
- any supporting shared types or docs

## Why It Matters

Why would this make the Haskell companion project stronger?

## Validation Ideas

How would we know the example is complete and correct?
